remember: Students will be able to recall and cite Python syntax, keywords, and basic data types.
Students will be able to list the built-in functions and modules in Python.
Students will be able to recall the basic operators and control structures in Python.
understand: Students will be able to explain the concept of variables, data types, and type casting in Python.
Students will be able to understand the concept of loops, conditional statements, and functions in Python.
Students will be able to explain the concept of modules, packages, and exception handling in Python.
apply: Students will be able to write Python programs using variables, data types, and control structures.
Students will be able to use loops, conditional statements, and functions to solve problems in Python.
Students will be able to use modules, packages, and exception handling to write robust Python programs.
analyze: Students will be able to analyze the efficiency of Python code and suggest improvements.
Students will be able to identify and debug errors in Python programs.
Students will be able to compare the performance of different Python data structures and algorithms.

ncert_objectives: To recall and use the basic syntax of Python programming language.
To understand the concept of variables, data types, and operators in Python.
To apply the concept of control structures, functions, and modules in Python.
board_exam_objectives: To write Python programs using variables, data types, and control structures.
To use loops, conditional statements, and functions to solve problems in Python.
To analyze the efficiency of Python code and suggest improvements.
